title: Shylily Community Server
description: This is the modpack used for the Shylily Community Server.
body:
This is the modpack used for the Shylily Community Server.

It will automatically receive updates to remain compatible with the official server, which is automatically present in the server list.

The pack is based on RLCraft, a widely popular modpack which Shylily really enjoyed. Just like RLCraft, the pack makes a variety of changes including but not limited to:

- Thirst, temperate and heat
- Realistic torches
- New biomes
- Better sound engine
- Backpacks
- A lot of new mobs, making the game more challenging
